Code: public int greenTicket(int a, int b, int c){return a==b&&b==c?20:a==b||b==c||a==c?10:0;}
public boolean love6(int a, int b){return a==6||b==6||a+b==6||Math.abs(a-b)==6;}
public int centeredAverage(int[] nums){java.util.Arrays.sort(nums);int sum=0;for(int i=1;i<nums.length-1;i++){sum+=nums[i];}return sum/(nums.length-2);}
